primary_operations.name: Save
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, err := r.client.PutItem(context.Background(), &dynamodb.PutItemInput{TableName: aws.String(r.table), Item: map[string]types.AttributeValue{"id": &types.AttributeValueMemberS{Value: entity.ID}}}); return err

primary_operations.name: FindById
primary_operations.sdk_call: out, err := r.client.GetItem(context.Background(), &dynamodb.GetItemInput{TableName: aws.String(r.table), Key: map[string]types.AttributeValue{"id": &types.AttributeValueMemberS{Value: id}}}); if err != nil { return Entity{}, err }; return Entity{ID: id}, nil

primary_operations.name: Delete
primary_operations.sdk_call: _, err := r.client.DeleteItem(context.Background(), &dynamodb.DeleteItemInput{TableName: aws.String(r.table), Key: map[string]types.AttributeValue{"id": &types.AttributeValueMemberS{Value: id}}}); return err

code_style_notes: AttributeValue is a tagged union — use the concrete type per attribute
GetItem on a missing key returns an empty Item, NOT an error
